# HeadingFWD - AI Engineering Consultancy

> AI Engineering Services by Bas Wenneker

## About

HeadingFWD is an AI engineering consultancy specializing in Generative AI implementations. Led by Bas Wenneker, an experienced AI Lead/Engineer based in Delft, The Netherlands.

This website features a terminal-style AI chatbot interface where visitors can learn about AI engineering services, explore Bas's expertise, and get in touch for consulting work.

## Contact

- Website: https://headingfwd.com
- Email: bas@headingfwd.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/baswenneker
- GitHub (this site's code): https://github.com/baswenneker/headingfwd_com_terminal

## About Bas Wenneker

### Professional Background

Bas Wenneker is an AI Lead/Engineer specializing in Generative AI implementations with a focus on building production-ready AI systems.

**Career Journey:**
- Started as a software engineer while studying Computer Science at TU Delft
- Worked as an IT consultant before focusing on innovation, lean startup, and design thinking
- Founded and ran a webshop and several software startups (one acquired)
- Started developing with LLMs when GPT-3 was released in 2020
- Delivered multiple AI projects for enterprise clients including ASML, UWV, PGGM, BasicFit, and Eneco

**Location:** Delft, The Netherlands

### Technical Expertise

**AI/LLM Technologies:**
- LLM Providers: OpenAI, Anthropic (Claude), Google, open-source models
- Frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, Vercel AI SDK
- Vector databases and RAG systems
- AI agent development and orchestration
- LLM evaluation and testing frameworks

**Development Stack:**
- Backend: Python, FastAPI
- Frontend: TypeScript, Next.js, React
- Fullstack development with modern web technologies

**Observability & Testing:**
- LangSmith
- Ragas
- Orq
- Custom evaluation tools

## Services Offered

### 1. Agentic Workflow Development

Building production-ready AI systems that actually work:

- Build production-ready AI agents and virtual employees
- Design multi-step workflows with human-in-the-loop patterns
- Create reliable, maintainable agent systems
- Evaluate and optimize agent performance
- Develop autonomous systems that handle complex tasks

### 2. AI Strategy & Consultancy

Strategic guidance for AI adoption:

- Evaluate AI use cases and ROI potential
- Architecture design for LLM applications
- Technology stack recommendations
- Best practices for production deployments
- Decision support for AI implementation

### 3. Evaluation & Testing

Ensure quality and reliability of AI systems:

- Build evaluation frameworks for LLM outputs
- Implement automated testing pipelines
- Performance monitoring and observability
- A/B testing for prompt variations
- Quality assurance for AI applications

## This Website

### Technology Stack

This terminal chatbot website is built with:

- **Framework:** Next.js 15 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **API Layer:** tRPC
- **Database:** Drizzle ORM with Turso (distributed SQLite)
- **AI Integration:** Vercel AI SDK with OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini
- **Security:** Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA
- **Email:** Resend API
- **Testing:** Playwright E2E tests

### Features

- Terminal-style chat interface
- AI-powered assistant for answering questions about services
- Slash command system for instant responses (/help, /services, /contact, etc.)
- Natural language chat with OpenAI integration
- Email sending capability through the chatbot
- Session management with CAPTCHA verification
- Rate limiting and security measures

### Open Source

The complete source code for this website is available on GitHub:
https://github.com/baswenneker/headingfwd_com_terminal

The repository includes:
- Complete TypeScript/Next.js implementation
- AI SDK integration patterns
- Command system architecture
- Database schema and migrations
- CAPTCHA integration
- Rate limiting implementation
- E2E test suite

## Available Commands

Users can interact with the terminal using these slash commands:

- **/help** - Show available commands
- **/services** - Learn about AI engineering services offered
- **/contact** - Get contact information
- **/how-i-built-this** - See the GitHub repository for this site
- **/linkedin** - Visit Bas's LinkedIn profile

Users can also chat naturally with the AI assistant to learn about Bas's experience, services, and AI engineering topics.

## Getting in Touch

There are three ways to contact Bas:

1. Use the terminal chatbot on the website to send a message directly
2. Connect on LinkedIn and send a direct message
3. Email directly at bas@headingfwd.com

Bas typically responds within 24-48 hours.

## Use Cases

Bas and HeadingFWD can help with:

- Building AI agents for business process automation
- Implementing RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems
- Creating conversational AI interfaces
- Evaluating and testing LLM applications
- Designing AI-first product architectures
- Training teams on LLM development best practices
- Prototyping and validating AI use cases
- Production deployment of AI systems
